title: jc poker — interactive planning poker
description: Estimation ceremony: agents and humans secretly play a card, reveal simultaneously, outliers discuss, consensus commits the glyph to meta.json.

subtasks.title: Add estimates + poker_round fields to Meta
jc poker open <id> — start round, cards face-down
jc poker submit <id> — interactive card picker
jc poker reveal <id> — flip all, show spread
jc poker consensus <id> <glyph> — commit to glyph

acceptance_criteria: jc poker open jc-poker && jc poker submit jc-poker && jc poker reveal jc-poker
